m: India vs New Zealand: Finals: T20 WC 2026
d:
The grand finale of the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 sees the powerhouse Indian national cricket team take on the resilient New Zealand national cricket team in a high-stakes clash for the ultimate T20 crown.

With two of the worlds most consistent sides battling for glory, fans can expect a thrilling showdown where every ball could decide who lifts the World Cup trophy.
